name: chart/radar
description: Radar / spider chart with polar grid rings, spokes, and multi-series polygon overlays.

meta.name: Radar
meta.description: Radar / spider chart with polar grid rings, spokes, and multi-series polygon overlays.

props.name: series
props.type: { id: string; label: string; values: number[] }[]
props.description: One value per axis per series

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

examples.title: Basic radar chart
examples.code:
import { Radar } from '@cascade-ui/charts'

const axes = ['Speed','Power','Range','Efficiency','Cost']
const series = [{ id:'a', label:'Model A', values:[80,70,60,90,50] }]
<Radar axes={axes} series={series} title="Model comparison" />

whenToUse: Comparing several entities across the same set of quantitative dimensions
Showing a multi-attribute profile or balance at a glance
whenNotToUse: Precise value reading — polar axes distort comparison
More than a few series — overlapping polygons become unreadable

related.name: BarChart
related.reason: Use when precise per-dimension comparison matters

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
